title: (UP TO $4600) 9mths Temp Accountant  #TNKA
description:
Job Summary

This role is to support the business units in operations from financial perspective and review/prepare accurate and timely financial reports for all companies (including subsidiaries and joint ventures) within their charge (both local and overseas) to get roll-up to the consolidated financial reports of CDL Group on time to meet regulatory requirements, as well as to facilitate management in the measurement of group performance with the strategies implemented and allow management to implement proactive measures to ensure that the profitability can continue to sustain and optimise its returns to shareholders.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the monthly closing of accounts for subsidiaries and joint venture companies to ensure timely and accurate financial reporting
  • Manage year-end audit processes and resolve all audit-related matters to maintain compliance and transparency
  • Review budget figures and tax computations based on source department data to support Group Reporting submissions
  • Deliver accounting services to joint venture partners and investors, ensuring clarity and accuracy in financial information
  • Prepare detailed management reports for Senior Management, joint venture partners, and investors to inform strategic decisions
  • Supervise and mentor 1 to 2 team members, providing guidance to enhance team performance and accuracy
  • Respond promptly to day-to-day operational enquiries and requests from managers and external parties to maintain smooth financial operations
  • Review management accounts prepared by overseas accounting agents to ensure consistency and accuracy
  • Prepare and file annual company tax returns in compliance with regulatory requirements

Required competencies and certifications

  • ACCA qualification or Degree in Accounting
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in account closing processes
  • Proficient knowledge of GST and tax provision regulations

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Basic knowledge of the property industry to support sector-specific financial operations
  • Familiarity with SAP software to enhance accounting system efficiency
  • Supervisory skills and experience to effectively lead small teams
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills to facilitate clear financial reporting and stakeholder engagement
  • Ability to perform effectively under pressure while maintaining accuracy and meeting deadlines
  • Collaborative team player mindset to support cross-functional cooperation

Frederick Tan

The Outsourcing Team

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA Lic: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
